## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ca5ba4e9963b86a0d413136370fbfc88c805d09d772ea48ca92c05755f0b05dc)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'identitysecuretokenserv' @ 10.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
